name: June 2025 Dinner
description: Deep discussion on Mary Meeker's AI report, the UK job market, model routing, startup ARR reporting, and changing the tech interview process for the AI era.

topics.text: Mary Meeker's AI Report — AI use heavily subsidised by VC money; cost per model will decrease driving adoption
UK job market is very tough for engineers, reminiscent of post-Lehman Brothers, but well-funded companies hiring top AI talent
Challenges of model routing — balancing cost and quality when auto-selecting models for tasks
Pipedream recommended to quickly connect to 1000s of API integrations
Google Labs as a place to experiment with latest Google AI products
Toxicity of startup MRR/ARR reporting on social media — inflated figures, undisclosed churn and margins
LangGraph recommended for building marketing agents
Changing the interview process for AI era — allowing candidates to use AI but requiring understanding
